settings.tab_how_to_use:
1. Section your hair into manageable portions.
  2. Glide the Dahlia Styler smoothly from root to tip.
  3. Repeat for each section until your look is complete.
settings.tab_shipping_returns: Free standard shipping on orders over 200 ر.س. Express delivery available at checkout. Returns accepted within 30 days of delivery in original condition.
